tagline: Update notifications now posted 3 days in advance.
what_it_does: Lakebase Autoscaling now provides notifications for planned updates at least 3 days in advance, reducing the previous notification period of 7 days. This allows users to prepare for updates that include Postgres upgrades, security patches, and other enhancements. Updates are applied during a user-defined window, and the compute is prewarmed to maintain performance during restarts.
why_it_matters: This change enhances operational efficiency by allowing teams to better plan for updates, minimizing disruption and ensuring that systems are kept secure and up-to-date. It benefits data engineers and platform managers by providing more timely information about necessary updates, which can improve overall system reliability and performance.
plain_summary: Lakebase now notifies users about upcoming updates just 3 days in advance instead of 7.

capabilities.title: Shortened Notification Window
capabilities.desc: Users receive update notifications 3 days in advance, allowing for better planning.

capabilities.title: Prewarming Cache
capabilities.desc: Lakebase prewarms the compute's cache during updates to maintain performance.

capabilities.title: User-defined Update Windows
capabilities.desc: Users can specify a preferred day and hour for updates to minimize disruption.

capabilities.title: Automatic Connection Handling
capabilities.desc: Most Postgres drivers automatically manage brief connection interruptions during updates.

use_cases: Planning for scheduled updates to minimize downtime.
Ensuring timely application of security patches.
Managing Postgres upgrades without significant disruption.
limitations: Computes in a transition state during an update are not updated.
If a compute is excluded from an update, it will receive the missed update with the next scheduled update.

steps.title: Access Lakebase App
steps.desc: Navigate to the Lakebase App from the apps switcher in your workspace.

steps.title: Select Project
steps.desc: Choose the project you want to manage updates for.

steps.title: Open Settings
steps.desc: Click on Settings and then select Updates.

steps.title: Choose Update Window
steps.desc: Specify a day of the week and an hour for updates.

steps.title: Check Upcoming Updates
steps.desc: Review your project's settings for any upcoming updates.

key_takeaway: Lakebase now provides update notifications 3 days in advance, improving planning and system reliability.
